zh.Bury Saint Edmunds, West Suffolk Distric: 英國英格蘭素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Griggs於1471年出生在英國素福爾可史坦菲爾德時，他的父親Sir John Griggs35歲，母親Rose de Suffolk31歲。他於大約1498年與Katherine Browne在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾斯坦福結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1515年4月15日在英國英格蘭素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲享年44歲。

nameMeanings.name: Griggs
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southeastern): from the Middle English personal name Grig, a pet form of Gregory (compare Gregg ), with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Gregory
meanings: English (of Norman origin) and French: from a personal name that was popular throughout Christendom in the Middle Ages. The Greek original, Grēgorios, is a derivative of grēgorein ‘to be awake, to be watchful’. However, the Latin form, Gregorius, came to be associated by folk etymology with grex, gregis ‘flock, herd’, under the influence of the Christian image of the good shepherd. The Greek name was borne in the early Christian centuries by two fathers of the Orthodox Church, Saint Gregory Nazianzene (c. 325–390) and Saint Gregory of Nyssa (c. 331–395), and later by sixteen popes, starting with Gregory the Great (c. 540–604). It was also the name of 3rd- and 4th-century apostles of Armenia. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed many cognates from other languages, e.g. Italian Gregorio , German, Slovak, and Slovenian Gregor , Polish Grzegorz, Czech Řehoř (see Rehor ), and French Gregoire , and also their patronymics and other derivatives, e.g. Polish Grzegorczyk .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Griggs was born in 1471, in Stansfield, Suffolk, England, his father, Sir John Griggs, was 35 and his mother, Rose de Suffolk, was 31. He married Katherine Browne about 1498, in Stamford, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 15 April 1515, in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 44.

Il a épousé Katherine Browne environ 1498, à Stamford, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 15 avril 1515, à Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 44 ans.

ko.Bury Saint Edmunds, West Suffolk Distric: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈
ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Griggs(이)가 1471년 영국 수폴크 스탠스필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Griggs(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Rose de Suffolk(은)는 31세였다. 그는 대략 1498년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 스타퍼드에서 Katherine Browne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1515년 4월 15일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Katherine Browne aproximadamente 1498, em Stamford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 15 de abril de 1515, em Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 44 anos.

ru.Bury Saint Edmunds, West Suffolk Distric: бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Griggs родился в 1471 г. в местности стансфиелд, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Griggs было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Rose de Suffolk, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Katherine Browne около 1498 г. в местности стамфорд, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 15 апреля 1515 г. в местности бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 44 лет.
